_description: Exit thresholds calibrated from 3-way backtest MFE/MAE analysis + signal-at-peak autopsy (Jul 2025 - Feb 2026)

deep_audit_mfe_safety_trim_pct.reason: 88% of eligible trades reached 2%+ MFE. All 127 gave-back trades had MFE>=2%. Trim at 2% captures profits before reversal.

deep_audit_stall_max_hours.reason: 12-24h holds at 10-18% WR across all engines. Tightening from 36h to 14 market-hours kills dead trades faster. Median peak is at 85h, so 14h catches DOA entries that never move.

deep_audit_stall_breakeven_pnl_pct.reason: Stalled trades with PnL < 0.3% after 14h should have SL moved to breakeven. Frees capital.

deep_audit_max_runner_drawdown_pct.reason: Gave-back trades reversed from avg 3.4% MFE to avg -4.5% loss. 2.5% drawdown from peak catches the reversal before it becomes a loss.

deep_audit_post_trim_trail_pct.reason: After first trim, trail at 2% from peak protects gains. Backtest shows 5d+ holds at 63-67% WR — let winners run with protection.

deep_audit_post_trim_breakeven.reason: After any trim, move SL to at least breakeven. Eliminates the possibility of a trimmed winner becoming a loser.

deep_audit_phase_peak_extreme.reason: Phase Osc at peak: p75=60, p90=80. Lowering from 70 to 65 catches 25%+ of peaks (was 18%). Not too aggressive — still allows strong momentum to run.

deep_audit_phase_decline_extreme.reason: Phase must decline by 20 from peak to confirm reversal. Prevents premature exits on pauses.

deep_audit_danger_max_signals.reason: Multi-factor danger score gate. 3 or more bearish signals block new LONG entries. Reduces dead entry rate.

deep_audit_vix_ceiling.reason: Block entries when VIX > 30. High VIX = high uncertainty = poor entry quality.

doa_gate_enabled.reason: DOA gate blocks entries when Daily + 4H SuperTrend both against trade direction.

tt_spy_directional_gate.reason: Block LONGs when SPY is bearish (htf<-10, regime<=-1). Shorts showed 28-35% WR across all engines.

deep_audit_loss_cooldown_hours.reason: After a loss on a ticker, wait 4 hours before re-entering. Prevents revenge trading.
